title: glade Plug In Holder and Refill, Electric Scented Oil, Happy Lucky Lilac, 20 ml
features: Get into a Spring mood with this air freshener from our new Limited Edition Electric Scented Oil from the Glade Positive Vibes Collection
Try out our exciting new Happy Lucky Lilac scent, with notes of purple lilac, sheer musk and four-leaf clover
This Glade air freshener plugin features fragrance masterfully designed by Aromachologists and is infused with Essential Oils
Feel the allure of long lasting authentic fragrance for up to 100 days (based on 12 hours use/day on low setting)
Glade Electric room freshener has five adjustable levels of fragrance release and Ceramic Heating Technology; shine with feel-good fragrances made without phthalates, parabens or formaldehyde
description: Product Description Radiate good vibes with Glade Electric Scented Oil Happy Lucky Lilac and light up the room with fragrance infused with Essential Oils. Get into the spirit of spring with notes of purple lilac, sheer musk and four-leaf clover. Enjoy this Glade Electric scented oils fragrance infused with Essential Oils for up to 100 days (based on 12 hours use/day on low setting). Glade scented oils feature fragrance masterfully designed by Aromachologists. Simply remove the cap from one of our Glade plug in refills and insert it into the Glade plug in device. Plug the socket upright into an outlet and let your air add an extra special personal touch to your decorating. Glade Electric essential oil air freshener has five adjustable levels of fragrance release and Ceramic Heating Technology. Discover the art of scent, and shine with feel-good fragrances, made without phthalates, parabens or formaldehyde. Ingredients Contains linalool alpha-hexylcinnamaldehyde linalyl acetate isoeugenol
